summary.intent: Fix a Codex review thread on PR #731 in fogodev/ars-ui by correcting the Dioxus form status-region detector to match only the qualified type path, and add SSR regression tests to cover the fix.
summary.outcome: The Dioxus fix was committed and pushed, but CI caught a missing Leptos parity test; the Leptos counterpart was added, all local tests passed, and the final commit was pushed with adapter parity green.

repo: The repo uses a custom `cargo xtask lint adapter-parity` gate that enforces test count parity between ars-dioxus and ars-leptos form SSR tests — adding a test to one adapter without the other fails CI.

Dioxus form status-region detection uses component-name scanning and must match the fully-qualified path `ars_dioxus::utility::form::StatusRegion` to avoid false positives on unrelated components with the same name.
Leptos tracks `form::StatusRegion` via context injection rather than component-name scanning, so its detection logic differs from the Dioxus adapter.

code.finding: Added a regression test for unrelated direct-child component named StatusRegion to keep the Leptos fallback live region present and satisfy adapter parity.
StatusRegion tracking uses context rather than name-based scanning; lines containing 'StatusRegion', 'has_status', and 'status_region' were audited via rg to confirm this.

workflow: Codex review is triggered by posting `@codex review` as an issue comment; pickup is confirmed by an 'eyes' reaction from `chatgpt-codex-connector`.
GraphQL mutations to resolve review threads require a `threadId` variable; a brace typo in a combined query silently failed and required splitting into simpler queries.
Polling CI with `gh pr checks 731 --watch=false` in sleep loops (60s, then 180s increments) is the pattern used to watch matrix jobs gate on clippy before the rest fan out.
`cargo xfmt` + `git diff --check` + `cargo xclippy` is the local pre-commit hygiene sequence used before every push.

friction: A brace typo in a combined GraphQL query caused a silent failure, requiring the query to be split into simpler separate calls.
CI adapter-parity gate caught a missing Leptos test that was not caught by local pre-commit checks, requiring an extra commit/push cycle.
Clippy is a serial gate in the CI matrix, forcing long sleep-poll loops (180s) before the rest of the matrix fans out.
`gh api` POST for review thread replies requires knowing the `in_reply_to` comment database ID upfront, which must be retrieved separately.
open_items: Codex final review result was not confirmed in the transcript — the fresh `@codex review` request was pending when the session ended.
The full CI matrix result after the Leptos parity commit was not verified; only local passes were confirmed.
